card_summary: Page 8 of the Tampa Bay Times (St. Petersburg, Florida), dated Thursday, April 5, 1990. The specific article or content on this page relating to Philip K. Dick cannot be determined from the available text alone.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Tampa Bay Times (St. Petersburg, Florida), dated Thursday, April 5, 1990, page 8. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This Florida newspaper clipping from 1990 documents the geographical spread of Dick's cultural influence. By 1990, Total Recall (the film adaptation of Dick's short story "We Can Remember It for You Wholesale") was generating significant publicity ahead of its June 1990 release. The Tampa Bay Times coverage may relate to this or other aspects of Dick's growing posthumous reputation. The specific content remains to be determined through examination of the scanned image.
